items.source: Press E to open your inventory
items.translation: 按 E 键打开物品栏

items.source: Press Escape or E to close
items.translation: 按 Esc 或 E 键关闭

items.source: Right-click a Crafting Table to open the crafting menu
items.translation: 右键单击工作台，打开合成菜单

items.source: Press Escape to pause the game
items.translation: 按 Esc 键暂停游戏

items.source: Getting an Upgrade: Construct a better pickaxe
items.translation: 更好的工具：制作一把更好的镐

items.source: Stone Age: Mine stone with your new pickaxe
items.translation: 石器时代：用你的新镐挖掘石头

items.source: Acquire Hardware: Smelt an iron ingot
items.translation: 获取硬件：冶炼一个铁锭

items.source: Suit Up: Protect yourself with a piece of armor
items.translation: 穿上盔甲：用一件盔甲保护自己

items.source: Hot Stuff: Fill a bucket with lava
items.translation: 热门物品：用桶装满岩浆

items.source: Ice Bucket Challenge: Obtain a block of obsidian
items.translation: 冰桶挑战：获得一块黑曜石

items.source: We Need to Go Deeper: Build a Nether portal
items.translation: 我们需要更深入：建造一个下界传送门

items.source: Into Fire: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
items.translation: 深入火中：从烈焰人身上取得烈焰棒

items.source: Creepers are afraid of cats
items.translation: 苦力怕害怕猫

items.source: Beds explode in the Nether and the End
items.translation: 床在下界和末地会爆炸

items.source: Drinking milk removes all potion effects
items.translation: 喝牛奶可以清除所有药水效果

items.source: Wearing a pumpkin prevents Endermen from attacking
items.translation: 戴上南瓜头可以防止末影人攻击

items.source: Use a name tag to rename a mob
items.translation: 使用命名牌给生物命名

items.source: Fortune increases the number of drops from ore blocks
items.translation: 时运附魔可以增加矿石方块的掉落数量

items.source: Mending repairs items using experience orbs
items.translation: 经验修补附魔可以用经验球修复物品

items.source: Silk Touch lets you mine blocks without breaking them
items.translation: 精准采集附魔让你采掘方块而不破坏它们

items.source: Unbreaking extends the durability of your tools
items.translation: 耐久附魔可以延长工具的耐久度

items.source: Looting increases the loot dropped by mobs
items.translation: 抢夺附魔可以增加生物掉落的战利品

items.source: Wearing gold armor prevents Piglins from attacking
items.translation: 穿戴金甲可以防止猪灵攻击

items.source: A compass always points to the world spawn point
items.translation: 指南针始终指向世界出生点

items.source: Fishing in rain increases your luck
items.translation: 在雨中钓鱼可以提高运气

items.source: %1$s was blown up by Creeper
items.translation: %1$s 被苦力怕炸飞了

items.source: %1$s was slain by Enderman
items.translation: %1$s 被末影人击杀

items.source: %1$s was shot by Skeleton
items.translation: %1$s 被骷髅射击

items.source: %1$s was slain by Zombie
items.translation: %1$s 被僵尸击杀

items.source: %1$s tried to swim in lava
items.translation: %1$s 试图在岩浆中游泳

items.source: A powerful sword made of diamond
items.translation: 一把用钻石制成的强力剑

items.source: A sturdy pickaxe made of iron
items.translation: 一把用铁制成的坚固镐

items.source: A wooden crafting station for all your recipes
items.translation: 用于所有配方的木制工作台

items.source: A mystical table for adding enchantments to items
items.translation: 用于给物品添加附魔的神秘台子

items.source: A teleportation item dropped by Endermen
items.translation: 末影人掉落的传送道具

items.source: Respawn
items.translation: 重生

items.source: You died!
items.translation: 你死了！

items.source: Game Over
items.translation: 游戏结束

items.source: New Highscore!
items.translation: 新纪录！

items.source: Score: %s
items.translation: 得分：%s

items.source: Now with achievements!
items.translation: 现已包含成就！

items.source: Made in Java!
items.translation: 用 Java 制作！

items.source: Survival mode!
items.translation: 生存模式！

items.source: Multiplayer ready!
items.translation: 多人游戏就绪！

items.source: Check out the Minecraft wiki!
items.translation: 快去看 Minecraft 百科！

items.source: Feather Falling reduces fall damage
items.translation: 摔落保护附魔可以减少摔落伤害

items.source: Placing a torch under water creates an air pocket
items.translation: 在水下放置火把可以创造气泡

items.source: Defeat the Ender Dragon to complete the main quest
items.translation: 击败末影龙以完成主线任务

items.source: Every block traveled in the Nether equals 8 in the Overworld
items.translation: 在下界每走一格相当于主世界八格

items.source: Tame wolves with bones to make them your loyal companions
items.translation: 用骨头驯服狼，让它们成为你忠诚的伙伴
